title: Statistical Modeling Intern - Spring 2027
description: Use Python, SQL, statistics, machine learning, research, modeling, algorithms, simulation, experimentation, and project ownership. Build production-adjacent analytics, forecasting, data pipelines, and metric experiments with mentorship.
requirements: Open to undergraduate BS/MS students in mathematics, statistics, computer science, operations research, or related fields. Python and SQL preferred.
